title: Razumovia tonkinensis
taxonomy: Razumovia tonkinensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to Tonkin, which is now part of northern Vietnam. The classification of Razumovia tonkinensis places it within the genus Razumovia and the family Annonaceae. The Annonaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the custard apple family. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and molecular characteristics.
